bead.title: B2: Tighten execute-bead shared blocks; add guardrail-list comment + invariant/selector/missing-governing tests
bead.description: Tighten the shared instruction blocks extracted by B1 for density per /tmp/story-12-final.md §B2. Step 0: prose -> 4-bullet checklist + 4-step recipe (~120->~80w). Process: drop verification-command examples; keep these as separate explicit bullets — do not commit red code; commit subject ends with [<bead-id>]; git add <specific-paths> (never -A); commit exactly once when green; stop after commit; do not modify outside bead scope (~150->~85w). Review-gate: two bullets — review is a gate; address every BLOCKING <review-findings> item, do not declare no_changes with blocking findings open (~80->~45w). Bead-override: one sentence (~70->~25w). Constraints tail bullets including '.ddx/executions/ intact' and 'never ddx init' as separate items (~60->~40w). Add load-bearing-guardrail comment block above each constant per FEAT-022 amendment (full guardrail list in /tmp/story-12-final.md Diagnosis section). Selector at execute_bead.go:1343: agent/fiz/embedded -> Agent variant; claude/codex/opencode/unknown -> Claude variant — must be preserved.
bead.acceptance: AC2: Rendered prompt for representative bead is >=30% shorter (word count) than current for both Claude and Agent variants — assert with size-floor test. AC3: New test TestExecuteBeadInstructionsLoadBearingGuardrails asserts every guardrail listed in the file-level comment block appears in the rendered prompt for each (harness, variant); includes selector tests (agent/fiz/embedded -> Agent; claude/codex/opencode/unknown -> Claude). AC4: New invariant tests assert rendered prompts contain [<bead-id>], git add <specific-paths>, NO 'git add -A', no_changes_rationale.txt, .ddx/executions/, ddx bead create, ddx bead dep add, ddx bead update. AC5: New test asserts non-minimal prompts include executeBeadMissingGoverningText; contextBudget == 'minimal' omits governing refs. AC6: All existing prompt tests pass unchanged. AC10: No new per-harness branches beyond Claude/Agent.
